MODULE: cosmos.automation.triggers
FILE: cosmos/automation/triggers.py (624 lines)
CATEGORY: automation

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Trigger System

"When something happens, something else happens! It's like dominoes, but with code!"

Event-driven triggers for automation workflows.

CLASSES:
- TriggerType(Enum): Types of triggers.
- TriggerStatus(Enum): Trigger status.
- Trigger: A trigger definition.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> 'Trigger'
- WebhookTrigger(Trigger): Webhook trigger configuration.
- ScheduleTrigger(Trigger): Schedule-based trigger.
- EventTrigger(Trigger): Event-based trigger.
- FileChangeHandler(FileSystemEventHandler): Handle file system events.
  Methods: def on_created(self, event)
  Methods: def on_modified(self, event)
  Methods: def on_deleted(self, event)
- TriggerManager: Manages all triggers for cosmos automation.
